title: Ship Types Bought
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ShipyardBuy WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(ShipType_Localised, 'Unknown') AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM ShipyardBuy WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY ShipType_Localised ORDER BY value DESC
